channel.title: Learning on Damu's Corner
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on Damu's Corner

item.title: 100 Days of ML Code
item.description: I saw this trending topic on Twitter and was momentarily inspired. I am creating this post so that I can catalogue whether I am able to channel this motivation into something good. Earlier in the month, I had made an accidental 1 year subscription on Datacamp due to a misunderstanding regarding the verification before paying process on the website. The mistake was mostly mine as I had forgotten that unlike Indian online payment portals, American (maybe everywhere else as well?
